name: rate-limit-upstash
title: Distributed rate limiting
description: Serverless-safe rate limiting backed by Upstash Redis, replacing the in-memory limiter
postInstall: This module replaces lib/rate-limit.ts with an Upstash-backed version; removing it restores the in-memory one
Create an Upstash Redis database and set UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN in .env.local

dataCollected: Request counts keyed by IP address
